problem.title: CT-ICP throughput and drift trade-off on the public HDL-400 reference window
problem.question: Which CT-ICP odometry profile should stay as the current default on a different public dataset family while keeping faster and denser alternatives comparable?

dataset.reference_role: public reference trajectory converted from pose_trace.csv

variants.label: Balanced window
variants.intent: Keep the current repository default as the continuous-time baseline.

variants.label: Fast window
variants.intent: Shrink the working set and point budget to improve FPS.

variants.label: Dense window
variants.intent: Increase point density and window richness to preserve more structure.
